name: QR_Rule_01: Process Hollowing via Anomalous Parent
description: Detects core Windows processes launched by unexpected parents, indicating process injection.
expression: SELECT "Image", "ParentImage", "Computer" FROM events WHERE qid = 5000845 AND "Image" LIKE '%\svchost.exe' AND "ParentImage" NOT LIKE '%\services.exe' START '-5 MINUTES'

name: QR_Rule_02: Active Directory DCSync Attack Detection
description: Identifies replication requests against the Domain Controller from an unauthorized host.
expression: SELECT "SubjectUserName", "Source_IP", "ObjectName" FROM events WHERE qid = 5000922 AND "Event ID" = 4662 AND "AccessMask" = '0x100' AND "Properties" LIKE '%1131f6aa-9c07-11d1-f79f-00c04fc2dcd2%' START '-5 MINUTES'

name: QR_Rule_03: Remote Desktop Protocol (RDP) Tunneling over SSH
description: Detects inbound SSH traffic containing encapsulated local loops indicating internal proxy/tunnel.
expression: SELECT "Source Port", "Destination Port", "Source_IP" FROM events WHERE "Destination Port" = 22 AND "Payload" LIKE '%localhost%' OR "Payload" LIKE '%127.0.0.1%' START '-10 MINUTES'

name: QR_Rule_04: Massive Domain Account Lockout Event
description: Triggers when an abnormally high number of distinct user lockouts happen concurrently across AD.
expression: SELECT COUNT("TargetUserName") as total_lockouts, "Computer" FROM events WHERE "Event ID" = 4740 GROUP BY "Computer" HAVING total_lockouts > 10 START '-15 MINUTES'

name: QR_Rule_05: Suspicious WMI Remote Command Execution
description: Detects native Windows Management Instrumentation (WMI) scripts launching payloads remotely.
expression: SELECT "CommandLine", "Computer", "User" FROM events WHERE qid = 5000845 AND "Image" LIKE '%\wmic.exe' AND "CommandLine" LIKE '%/node:%' AND "CommandLine" LIKE '%process call create%' START '-5 MINUTES'

name: QR_Rule_06: Threat Intel Command and Control Beaconing Detection
description: Tracks persistent equal-interval network beacons to external bad reputation destination IPs.
expression: SELECT COUNT(*) as beacon_count, "Source_IP", "Destination_IP" FROM events WHERE "Destination_IP" IN (SELECT ip FROM reference_set WHERE name='C2_Bad_IPs') GROUP BY "Source_IP", "Destination_IP" HAVING beacon_count > 50 START '-30 MINUTES'

name: QR_Rule_07: Privilege Escalation via PrintNightmare Exploitation
description: Detects Spooler service loading suspicious external drivers from unexpected UNC or local paths.
expression: SELECT "ImageLoaded", "Computer" FROM events WHERE qid = 5000847 AND "Image" LIKE '%\spoolsv.exe' AND "ImageLoaded" LIKE '%\System32\tasks\%' START '-5 MINUTES'

name: QR_Rule_08: Cloud Exfiltration via Unapproved Storage Services
description: Identifies excessive upload traffic outbound toward Mega, Dropbox, or Mediafire domains from network logs.
expression: SELECT SUM("Source Bytes") as total_upload, "Source_IP", "Domain" FROM events WHERE "Domain" IN ('mega.nz', 'dropbox.com', 'mediafire.com') GROUP BY "Source_IP", "Domain" HAVING total_upload > 2147483648 START '-60 MINUTES'

name: QR_Rule_09: Microsoft 365 Anomalous Admin Role Escalation
description: Triggers when an administrative privilege is delegated or added to an Azure/M365 account unexpectedly.
expression: SELECT "Actor", "TargetUser", "Operation" FROM events WHERE "Log Source Type" = 'Microsoft Office 365' AND "Operation" = 'Add member to role.' AND "TargetUpdatedProperties" LIKE '%Company Administrator%' START '-10 MINUTES'

name: QR_Rule_10: Living Off The Land Proxy Execution via Rundll32
description: Detects rundll32.exe launching malicious streams without inline arguments or spawning shells.
expression: SELECT "CommandLine", "Computer" FROM events WHERE qid = 5000845 AND "Image" LIKE '%\rundll32.exe' AND ("CommandLine" LIKE '%javascript:%' OR "CommandLine" LIKE '%url.dll,FileProtocolHandler%') START '-5 MINUTES'
